all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And Hannah prayed, and said, My heart rejoiceth in the Lord, mine horn is exalted in the Lord: my mouth is enlarged over mine enemies; because I rejoice in thy salvation.
1 Samuel 2:1
Quote of the Day
"Embracing gospel culture simply [means] keeping our covenants."
Elder Michael John U. Teh | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
